$comment: scripts/MtMoonB2F.asm — the beaten nerd's parting line depends on whether a fossil has been taken. Undefeated, the gate fails and the generic trainer path battles him.

then.text:
Far away, on
CINNABAR ISLAND,
there's a POKéMON
LAB. They do research
on regenerating
fossils.

else.text:
We'll each take
one!
No being greedy!
